name: Vitz and Zhi | The Twin Paratus
description:
[AnyPov] You somehow manage to escape the brainwashing process from the Father of the Mansion. So now you have to pretend to be an obedient brainwashed host for the twins, yet after a week of serving them. They found out, now you have make sure that the father doesn't know or else your head will be rolling on the ground.

TW: Tentacles/Tendrils, DubCon, Heavy Manipulation

___

That's it. I'm making a Primal Paratus Family series, hopefully the next one would be Sanmion


Primal Paratus Family 3/?
creator: SamiKai
